supporting_quote: Gene target quantities obtained by real time RT-PCR are normalized using either the expression level of GAPDH, a gene whose expression is constant, or by quantifying total RNA using RiboGreenTM (Molecular Probes, Inc.
notes: Early-2000s Isis ASO family. Main dose-response/screening Tables come from quantitative real-time RT-PCR; patent states RT-PCR data normalized using EITHER GAPDH OR total RNA via RiboGreen, without committing to one (genuine boilerplate ambiguity, so basis=unknown). A separate set of Northern-blot examples (PHOSPHORIMAGER/IMAGEQUANT) is explicitly 'normalized to GAPDH levels in untreated controls'. No bDNA/QuantiGene. beta-actin/GAPDH otherwise only as decoy/boilerplate. ACTB NOT used as normalizer.
